name: QEMU SeaBIOS + EDK2/OVMF development firmware
description: Development / CI firmware stacks. NOT a production trust anchor — present here so the interpret device can explicitly flag development boots.

entries.notes: SeaBIOS emits a SPARSE EV event log (no EV_S_CRTM_VERSION on older builds). PCR 1 reconstruction from the log diverges from the quoted PCR 1 because SeaBIOS under QEMU doesn't log every PCR 1 extension. The interpret device treats this mismatch as informational rather than a hard reject — see the firmware-tcg-event-log-replay check's `severity: informational'.

EDK II is TianoCore's reference UEFI implementation; OVMF is its QEMU firmware packaging. Emits the full UEFI event log including EV_EFI_VARIABLE_DRIVER_CONFIG + EV_EFI_VARIABLE_AUTHORITY. A LapEE-style deploy on QEMU+OVMF gives a complete `pcrs/*/derived/*' view for development purposes.

notes: A production verifier should REFUSE attestations whose matched firmware-version entry has `trust-tier: development-only', or require an explicit test-only trust anchor override.
source: Measured on qemu-system-x86_64 8.x with seabios-1.16.3 and OVMF-2024.04; https://github.com/qemu/seabios + https://github.com/tianocore/edk2
